title: Multi-agent tabs and EventStore replay
purpose: When multiple agents are running, the user needs to switch between them to see their output. This brief adds tab-based agent switching with EventStore replay, allowing the user to navigate the agent tree and review each agent's work in the scroll region.
task: Implement tab state management and EventStore replay in agents/tabs.rs. Tab cycles focus between agents. Enter on a focused agent switches the active tab. Switching tabs replays the last N events from the target agent's EventStore into the scroll region through the same renderers used for live output. A separator line marks each tab switch. Thinking content is available in replay via the AssistantMessage.thinking field — render it with dim treatment when the thinking_visible toggle is active.

requirements.title: Tab state management
requirements.spec: The TUI SHALL maintain tab state tracking the active agent and background agents.
acceptance: TabState struct holds: active_agent_id (Uuid), background_agents (Vec<Uuid>)
The root agent is the initial active tab
When a new child spawns, it is added to background_agents
When an agent completes and its hold period (NT-009) expires, it is removed from tabs
Test: spawning a child adds it to background_agents

requirements.title: Tab focus cycling
requirements.spec: WHEN the user presses Tab (with no autocomplete popup open), THE SYSTEM SHALL cycle focus between agents in the fixed panel.
acceptance: Tab moves focus to the next agent in the status line list (wrapping to first after last)
The focused agent's status line renders with highlight styling (reverse video or distinct background)
Tab on a single-agent session is a no-op (no agent lines to focus)
Test: Tab on 3-agent tree cycles through all three

requirements.title: Tab switch on Enter
requirements.spec: WHEN the user presses Enter on a focused agent (with empty input), THE SYSTEM SHALL switch the active tab to that agent AND replay its recent events into the scroll region.
acceptance: Enter on a focused agent (with empty input buffer) triggers a tab switch
The previously active agent becomes a background tab
The focused agent becomes the new active tab
Enter on the currently active agent is a no-op
Enter with non-empty input submits the input (normal submit behaviour, not tab switch)
Test: switching from root to child changes active_agent_id

requirements.title: EventStore replay on tab switch
requirements.spec: WHEN switching tabs, THE SYSTEM SHALL replay the last N events (default 20) from the target agent's EventStore into the scroll region using the same renderers as live output.
acceptance: replay_events(store, count, caps, renderers) reads the last N events from the EventStore by slicing the events() Vec: let last_n = &events[events.len().saturating_sub(n)..] (EventStore has no last_n() API)
Each event is rendered through the same dispatch (NT-008 render_event) used for live output
Replayed assistant messages go through the markdown pipeline
Replayed tool results go through the per-tool renderers
Thinking content IS available in replay — read from AssistantMessage.thinking field, rendered with dim treatment when thinking_visible is true
The replay count is configurable (default 20)
Test: replaying 5 events from a store with 10 events renders the last 5
Test: replayed AssistantMessage with thinking field shows thinking content when thinking_visible is true

requirements.title: Tab switch separator
requirements.spec: WHEN switching tabs, THE SYSTEM SHALL write a separator line into the scroll region before replaying events.
acceptance: Separator format: '════════ switched to: {agent_name} ════════'
Separator spans the terminal width
Separator renders with distinct styling (dim or specific colour)
The separator is written before the replayed events, not after
Test: tab switch produces a separator containing the agent name

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement agent status line rendering or tree collapse — that is NT-009
SHALL NOT implement the event loop — that is NT-011
SHALL NOT modify the EventStore or AssistantMessage type — thinking persistence is handled by the norn runtime
SHALL NOT add todo!() or unimplemented!() macros anywhere
verification: Tab cycling moves focus through agents — verified by test
Tab switch changes active agent — verified by test
EventStore replay renders correct number of events — verified by test
Separator line contains agent name — verified by test
Replay includes thinking content from AssistantMessage.thinking when thinking_visible is true — verified by test
